    g.state,

WHERE
    g.country = 'India'

మొత్తం ఆలోపతిక బయటి రోగుల హాజరు ప్రమాణం ఆధారంగా పట్టణ ఉప జిల్లాలను ర్యాంక్ చేయండి, ప్రతి ఒక్కదానిలోనూ హాజరు సంఖ్యలు మరియు మొత్తం BCG టీకాలు ఇవ్వబడినవి కూడా చూపించండి.
gold_sql: SELECT T1.SUB_DISTRICT, SUM(T2.OUTPATIENT_ATTENDANCE_ALLOPATHIC), SUM(T3.BCG_VACCINE) FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_OUTPATIENT_SERVICES AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN FACT_CHILD_IMMUNIZATION_ROUTINE AS T3 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T3.GEOGRAPHY_ID WHERE T1.TYPE_OF_AREA = 'Urban' GROUP BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT ORDER BY SUM(T2.OUTPATIENT_ATTENDANCE_ALLOPATHIC) DESC
predicted_sql:
SELECT 
    dg.sub_district,
    SUM(fos.outpatient_attendance_allopathic) AS total_outpatient_attendance_allopathic,
    SUM(fcir.bcg_vaccine) AS total_bcg_vaccines
FROM dim_geography dg
JOIN fact_outpatient_services fos ON dg.geography_id = fos.geography_id
JOIN fact_child_immunization_routine fcir ON dg.geography_id = fcir.geography_id AND fos.time_id = fcir.time_id
WHERE dg.type_of_area ILIKE 'urban'
GROUP BY dg.sub_district
ORDER BY total_outpatient_attendance_allopathic DESC;

question:
ఈ ప్రశ్నను తెలుగులో అనువదించండి:
2021లో రికార్డ్ చేయబడిన మొదటి డోస్ విటమిన్ ఎ నిర్వహణల మొత్తం సంఖ్యలో అండమాన్ మరియు నికోబార్ దీవులలో అగ్ర 5 ఉప జిల్లాలను గుర్తించండి.
gold_sql: SELECT T1.SUB_DISTRICT, SUM(T2.VITAMIN_A_DOSE_1) FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 INNER JOIN FACT_CHILD_IMMUNIZATION_SPECIALIZED AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID INNER JOIN DIM_TIME AS T3 ON T2.TIME_ID = T3.TIME_ID WHERE T1.STATE = 'Andaman And Nicobar Islands' AND T3.YEAR = '2021' GROUP BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT ORDER BY SUM(T2.VITAMIN_A_DOSE_1) DESC LIMIT 5
predicted_sql:
SELECT dg.sub_district, SUM(fcis.vitamin_a_dose_1) AS total_vitamin_a_dose_1
FROM dim_geography dg
JOIN fact_child_immunization_specialized fcis ON dg.geography_id = fcis.geography_id
JOIN dim_time dt ON fcis.time_id = dt.time_id
WHERE dg.state ILIKE 'Andaman And Nicobar Islands' AND dt.year = 2021
GROUP BY dg.sub_district
ORDER BY total_vitamin_a_dose_1 DESC
LIMIT 5;
raw_output:
SELECT dg.sub_district, SUM(fcis.vitamin_a_dose_1) AS total_vitamin_a_dose_1
FROM dim_geography dg
JOIN fact_child_immunization_specialized fcis ON dg.geography_id = fcis.geography_id
JOIN dim_time dt ON fcis.time_id = dt.time_id
WHERE dg.state ILIKE 'Andaman And Nicobar Islands' AND dt.year = 2021
GROUP BY dg.sub_district
ORDER BY total_vitamin_a_dose_1 DESC
LIMIT 5;

అండమాన్ మరియు నికోబార్ దీవులలో, 2021లో గర్భిణీ స్త్రీలు ప్రసూతి పూర్వ సంరక్షణ కోసం నమోదు చేసుకున్న వారిలో 50% కంటే తక్కువ మందికి నాలుగు లేదా అంతకంటే ఎక్కువ ప్రసూతి పూర్వ సంరక్షణ తనిఖీలు లభించిన ఉప-జిల్లాలను గుర్తించండి.
gold_sql: SELECT T1.SUB_DISTRICT FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_MATERNAL_REGISTRATION_TESTING AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN DIM_TIME AS T3 ON T2.TIME_ID = T3.TIME_ID WHERE T1.STATE = 'Andaman And Nicobar Islands' AND T3.YEAR = '2021' GROUP BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT HAVING SUM(T2.PREGNANCY_WOMEN_RECEIVED_4_OR_MORE_ANC_CHECKUPS) * 1.0 / NULLIF(SUM(T2.PREGNANT_WOMEN_REGISTERED_FOR_ANC), 0) < 0.5 ORDER BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT ASC
predicted_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT dg.sub_district
FROM dim_geography dg
JOIN fact_maternal_registration_testing fmrt ON dg.geography_id = fmrt.geography_id
JOIN dim_time dt ON fmrt.time_id = dt.time_id
WHERE dg.state ILIKE 'Andaman And Nicobar Islands'
  AND dt.year = 2021
  AND (fmrt.pregnancy_women_received_4_or_more_anc_checkups / NULLIF(fmrt.pregnant_women_registered_for_anc, 0)) * 100 < 50;
raw_output:
SELECT DISTINCT dg.sub_district
FROM dim_geography dg
JOIN fact_maternal_registration_testing fmrt ON dg.geography_id = fmrt.geography_id
JOIN dim_time dt ON fmrt.time_id = dt.time_id
WHERE dg.state ILIKE 'Andaman And Nicobar Islands'
  AND dt.year = 2021
  AND (fmrt.pregnancy_women_received_4_or_more_anc_checkups / NULLIF(fmrt.pregnant_women_registered_for_anc, 0)) * 100 < 50;

question: 2022లో గ్రామీణ ప్రాంతాల కోసం, ఉప-జిల్లాల వారీగా విభజించి, ANC కోసం నమోదు చేయబడిన గర్భిణీ స్త్రీల మొత్తం సంఖ్య మరియు నిర్వహించబడిన HB పరీక్షల సగటు సంఖ్యను అందించండి.
gold_sql: SELECT T1.SUB_DISTRICT, SUM(T2.PREGNANT_WOMEN_REGISTERED_FOR_ANC), AVG(T2.NUMBER_OF_HB_TESTS_CONDUCTED) FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_MATERNAL_REGISTRATION_TESTING AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN DIM_TIME AS T3 ON T2.TIME_ID = T3.TIME_ID WHERE T1.TYPE_OF_AREA = 'Rural' AND T3.YEAR = '2022' GROUP BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT
predicted_sql:
SELECT
    g.sub_district,
    SUM(mrt.pregnant_women_registered_for_anc) AS total_pregnant_women_registered,
    AVG(mrt.number_of_hb_tests_conducted) AS avg_hb_tests_conducted
FROM dim_geography g
JOIN fact_maternal_registration_testing mrt ON g.geography_id = mrt.geography_id
JOIN dim_time t ON mrt.time_id = t.time_id
WHERE t.year = 2022
    AND g.type_of_area ILIKE 'rural'
GROUP BY g.sub_district
ORDER BY g.sub_district;
raw_output:
SELECT
    g.sub_district,
    SUM(mrt.pregnant_women_registered_for_anc) AS total_pregnant_women_registered,
    AVG(mrt.number_of_hb_tests_conducted) AS avg_hb_tests_conducted
FROM dim_geography g
JOIN fact_maternal_registration_testing mrt ON g.geography_id = mrt.geography_id
JOIN dim_time t ON mrt.time_id = t.time_id
WHERE t.year = 2022
    AND g.type_of_area ILIKE 'rural'
GROUP BY g.sub_district
ORDER BY g.sub_district;

WHERE dt.year = 2021 AND dg.state ILIKE 'Andaman And Nicobar Islands'
ORDER BY fmrt.pregnancy_women_hb_level_less_11 DESC
